notes: Validation regressed from 0.80 to 0.76 strict and 0.82 to 0.78 loose. See [the full report](ifeval/results.md) for the validation and test breakdown.

Second optimization round from the checkpoint prompt with Claude Sonnet 4.6. Validation loose improved 0.78 to 0.80, but held-out strict test regressed 0.86 to 0.84. Net strict improvement from the original baseline is 0.00.

Full 541-row corpus with a 441/50/50 split. Optimizer/teacher and verifier used google/gemma-4-31b-it. Validation strict moved from 0.80 to 0.76 and validation loose from 0.82 to 0.78, but held-out strict test improved from 0.84 to 0.86.
